/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/config/dashboard_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/dashboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/gauges/analog_gauge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/gauges/analog_gauge_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/gauges/blinker_light.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/gauges/fuel_gauge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/gauges/gauge_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/gauges/rpm_gauge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/gauges/speed_gauge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/gauges/temp_gauge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/gauges/warning_light.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/display/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/signals/adc_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/signals/pulse_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/signals/signal_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ccj.dir/src/signals/simulator.cpp.o -o ccj  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so -lSDL2_image -lSDL2
